mapper.select: select su.user_id,su.name,su.phone,su.gender,su.age,su.user_number,su.verified,su.dept_id,sd.name as deptName from cm_customer su left join sys_dept sd on su.dept_id = sd.dept_id where su.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update:
update cm_customer set verified = '0', merchant_id = null, inviter_id = null, invitation_code = null where user_id in
#{id}
mapper.select: select count(*) from cm_customer where invitation_code = #{code}
mapper.update: update cm_customer set merchant_id = #{merchantId} where user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: select c.user_id, c.phone, c.name, c.avatar, c.user_score, c.if_gift_score, ifnull(a.count, 0) as invition from cm_customer c left join (select inviter_id, count(inviter_id) as count from cm_customer group by inviter_id) a on c.user_id = a.inviter_id where role_id = 2 and verified = '2' and merchant_id = #{merchantId}
mapper.update:
update cm_customer set if_gift_score = '1' where user_id in
#{id}
